DP.214.0000:
Mr. Fuego: Well, hello!
It’s not often I get a visitor here.\f
I tried to make the ironworks run
better with the moving floor tiles.\f
But no one was happy about it! They
said the moving floor made them dizzy!\f
But you don’t want to listen to me
whine. Here’s a souvenir!\f
DP.214.0001:
Mr. Fuego: My ironworks would be
nothing if there were no iron.\f
That’s why I’m always thankful for
nature supplying me with iron.
